summary: Phase 11 Testing: Stats Page Features (Golos Sofridos, Últimos 5 Jogos, Pe/LD format) and Club Venue Fields. All features tested and working correctly. Backend: 6/6 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright. Fixed bug: venue_name and venue_location were missing from allowed_fields in club update endpoint.

golos_sofridos_card.description: Card 'Golos Sofridos' (red styling) displays on Stats page. Shows goals conceded from standings data (e.g., 41 goals). Uses Shield icon with destructive color scheme.

ultimos_5_jogos.description: Section 'ÚLTIMOS 5 JOGOS' displays colored circles: green (V=Vitória), red (D=Derrota), yellow (E=Empate). Circles are clickable buttons that navigate to match stats page. Shows legend 'V = Vitória | E = Empate | D = Derrota'.

pe_ld_format.description: Stats table shows Pe (Penáltis) and LD (Livres Diretos) in 'marcados/tentativas' format. Shows '-' when no data. Columns visible in individual stats table with proper headers and tooltips.

club_venue_fields.description: Club page shows 'PAVILHÃO' section with venue_name and venue_location. Edit form includes 'Pavilhão do Clube' section with inputs for 'Nome do Pavilhão' and 'Localização do Pavilhão'. Fields save and display correctly.
club_venue_fields.bug_fixed: Added venue_name and venue_location to allowed_fields in PUT /api/clubs/{club_id}

click_result_navigation.description: Clicking on a result circle in 'Últimos 5 Jogos' navigates to the match stats page at /championships/{championshipId}/matches/{matchId}/stats

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed venue data created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 features fully functional: 1) Golos Sofridos card (red) shows goals_against from standings, 2) Últimos 5 Jogos shows colored circles (V/E/D) that are clickable and navigate to match stats, 3) Pe/LD columns show 'marcados/tentativas' format or '-', 4) Club venue_name and venue_location fields save and display correctly. Bug fixed: venue fields were missing from allowed_fields in club update endpoint. Championship ID for testing: 909d5f9b-1087-4265-94ff-c7c44a3e84ed.
